metadata.validity_note: Bounds are support-set valid only to the extent that the analytical rho upper bound is valid. Stress-test OBBT bounds are diagnostic unless stress trajectories exhaust the support set.
metadata.bid_bound_note: global uses configured/default bid_lb and bid_ub. true_cost fixes each block bid bound to its marginal cost and is only valid for no-policy or fixed true-cost experiments, not for learned/strategic bid policies.
metadata.rho_activity_warning: If final PoA solve dual_bound_activity reports rho_up or rho_down at its bound, increase --rho-ub-default and recompute these bounds.
